name: search-engine
description: Advanced search engine with agent-based query processing

scripts.build: cargo build --all && npm --prefix app run build
scripts.test: cargo test --all && npm --prefix agents test && npm --prefix app test
scripts.lint: cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings && npx eslint agents/src --fix && npx eslint app --fix
scripts.hooks:run: lefthook run pre-commit && lefthook run pre-push
